title: Exposed API Documentation or Collection
description: The external surface includes reachable API documentation, schema endpoints, or collection-style artifacts that can aid enumeration and attack-path development.
impact: Exposed API docs can accelerate endpoint discovery, reveal internal object models, and simplify abuse or misconfiguration testing.
likelihood: Medium because exploitability depends on the API controls behind the documented surface.
recommendations: Restrict sensitive API documentation to authenticated or internal-only audiences where appropriate.
Review whether the exposed documentation reveals administrative or internal endpoints.
Ensure production APIs behind documented routes enforce strong authentication and authorization.
